description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines two hidden jobs, .omnibus-e2e and .cache-gitlab-qa, each setting the variable GIT_STRATEGY to clone. Then include the external CI configuration file .gitlab/ci/test-on-omnibus/main.gitlab-ci.yml from the gitlab-org/gitlab project at the master ref, allowing that file to provide its own stages, jobs, and Docker images. Ensure the hidden jobs propagate the clone strategy to any jobs that inherit them.
